ocr_snippet: STORAGE TEMP: 2-8°C TRANSFUSION ADVISED Immediately after receipt. Use Disposable Disinfectiong Kits with filters only. For any suspected adverse reaction, discontinue transfusion , maintain IV access with saline in any visible evidence of deterioration immediately stop transfusion.  If not already done, start supportive treatment. Monitor vital signs and administer medications as prescribed. After transfusion, monitor infusion site for bleeding Monitor BP regularly.
